name: Floor Item Anywhere Premade Module
author: Shockless
description: Readable user-plugin source reference for the built-in Floor Item Anywhere module.

surfaces.label: Floor Item Anywhere Panel
surfaces.summary: Native Object Mover compatibility toggle and status.

layout.text: Enables native floor furniture drag/drop outside visible room tiles.

children.text: Click a floor item, press Move, drag it outside the visible room floor, then click to place.
